text:
All clean. Here's what was added:

**In the swap tab (From section):**
- After selecting a `from` token, a background scan fires automatically (skips native tokens — ETH/SOL are always safe)
- While scanning: a subtle "Scanning token security..." spinner appears
- When results arrive: a structured panel renders between the From card and the swap arrow, showing:
  - **Verdict banner** — one-line plain-English summary, color-coded red/yellow/blue
  - **Taxes** — buy/sell/transfer % with severity colors
  - **Holders** — count, creator %, top-10 concentration
  - **Liquidity** — pool presence, lock status + %
  - **Contract** — age, verified/unverified, mintable, pausable, hidden owner
  - **Critical alerts** — honeypot, phishing, sanctioned, etc. with ✕ prefix
- Panel only shows if there are actual risks — safe tokens show nothing

**In the token dropdown (From only):**
- Risky tokens in the list now expand inline to show the same structured security panel
- The panel is non-clickable (stops propagation) so you can read it without accidentally selecting the token
- Other tabs (To, Batch destination) keep the compact single-line flag display
